title: Isolation of Nuclei from Frozen Human Peripheral Nerve
author: Alexander Chamessian
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6zqhf5w

steps.instruction: Nerve samples should be collected as quickly as possible from the donor. Place the nerve in a clean, labeled container. Snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen Store at -80C until usage
Remove the sample from -80C storage and maintain on dry ice. Do not let it thaw.
